sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9639" key="a)ntecetaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεξ-εταστέον</orth>, <sense id="n9639.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must compare,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:30:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
